hooks.command: CMD=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"command":\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE '^git (push|commit)'; then git fetch 2>/dev/null; BEHIND=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..@{u} 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$BEHIND" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"feedback\": \"WARNING: local branch is $BEHIND commit(s) behind remote. Pull or rebase before proceeding.\"}"; else echo '{"feedback": "remote check ok"}'; fi; fi

FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -oP '"file_path":\s*"\K[^"]+' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python3 -m py_compile "$FILE" 2>&1 && echo '{"feedback": "syntax ok"}' || echo "{\"feedback\": \"syntax error in $FILE\"}"; fi
